descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: Draw 1 Helot: Catena Command Card, reducing the Arithmetica Cost of Helot: Catena Command Cards in hand by 1.] This turn, when Helot: Catena deals Active DMG, add [Arg2]% {Bleed}. Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG.

patch.descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: Draw 1 Helot: Catena Command Card, reducing the Arithmetica Cost of Helot: Catena Command Cards in hand by 1.] This turn, when Helot: Catena deals Active DMG, add [Arg2]% {Bleed}. Remove the Target's Shield, deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and prevent them from gaining a Shield next turn.
